Klasse Note

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Note
public class Note extends Object
Simple domain model for a personal note. Stores title, content, and a formatted date string.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Note

      public Note(String title, String content, String date)
      Creates a new note instance.
      Parameter:
      title - note title
      content - note content/body
      date - formatted date string (e.g. "dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm:ss")

  • Methodendetails

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Gibt zurück:
      note title

    • getContent

      public String getContent()
      Gibt zurück:
      note content/body

    • getDate

      public String getDate()
      Gibt zurück:
      formatted date string

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Updates the note title.
      Parameter:
      title - new title

    • setContent

      public void setContent(String content)
      Updates the note content/body.
      Parameter:
      content - new content

    • setDate

      public void setDate(String date)
      Updates the note date string.
      Parameter:
      date - new formatted date string
